spec_match.rationale: The repaired behavior follows the advertised platform contract and retains an honest fallback.

interactive.rationale: All detected controls were exercised in a fresh direct same-origin browser run.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The resulting state matches the concept description.

edge_cases.rationale: Unavailable capabilities, stale controls, and denied operations are handled without uncaught exceptions.

references.rationale: Existing feature and specification references are retained.

design_system.rationale: The repair preserves the existing visual and fallback treatment.

runtime_evidence.rationale: The post-fix direct browser sweep loaded the route, exercised every detected control, and found no runtime, action, naming, or navigation failure.

summary: Renamed the animation handler so inline event scope no longer calls Element.animate() without keyframes. Post-fix validation passed.
